description_long: This refrigerator features a retro-inspired design with a rectangular, boxy form and a two-door configuration, separated horizontally into upper and lower compartments. The exterior is finished in a teal color with metallic gold accents, including prominent vertical handles on both doors and a metallic top surface. The left side of the refrigerator displays a series of gold-colored, tubular elements arranged vertically and horizontally, resembling a condenser coil or decorative grille. The right side and back are plain, with the handles and coil only visible from certain angles. The overall appearance is robust and functional, with a smooth, glossy finish and minimal ornamentation aside from the coil detail. No visible branding or digital controls are present on the exterior.
description: A teal, two-door refrigerator with gold handles and a decorative gold coil on one side, featuring a retro, boxy design and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two teal doors with vertical gold handles and a metallic top surface.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the plain teal surface and the edge of the gold handles.
description_view_2: Rear or left side view highlighting the gold coil or grille detail attached to the side.
description_view_3: Left side view with a plain teal surface and the gold handles visible at the edge.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding vertical handles, metallic gold, mounted on the front of each door.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Gold tubular coil pattern on the left side, arranged vertically and horizontally.
